verses.text: Weep, ye rich, for miseries to come; your hoarded gold 'is cankered,' a witness against you. Rotting wealth. Riches selfishly heaped up will condemn their owners.
Weep, ye rich, for miseries to come; your hoarded gold 'is cankered,' a witness against you. Rotting wealth. Riches selfishly heaped up will condemn their owners.
Weep, ye rich, for miseries to come; your hoarded gold 'is cankered,' a witness against you. Rotting wealth. Riches selfishly heaped up will condemn their owners.
The hire of your labourers, kept back by fraud, 'crieth' to the Lord of sabaoth; you have lived in pleasure and condemned the just. Crying wages. God hears the oppressed worker.
The hire of your labourers, kept back by fraud, 'crieth' to the Lord of sabaoth; you have lived in pleasure and condemned the just. Crying wages. God hears the oppressed worker.
The hire of your labourers, kept back by fraud, 'crieth' to the Lord of sabaoth; you have lived in pleasure and condemned the just. Crying wages. God hears the oppressed worker.
Be patient unto the coming of the Lord, like the farmer waiting for rain; 'the judge standeth before the door.' Wait patiently. The Lord's return is near; endure.
Be patient unto the coming of the Lord, like the farmer waiting for rain; 'the judge standeth before the door.' Wait patiently. The Lord's return is near; endure.
Be patient unto the coming of the Lord, like the farmer waiting for rain; 'the judge standeth before the door.' Wait patiently. The Lord's return is near; endure.
Take the prophets and Job for an example of suffering and patience; 'the Lord is very pitiful, and of tender mercy.' Endured and blessed. God's end for the patient is mercy.
Take the prophets and Job for an example of suffering and patience; 'the Lord is very pitiful, and of tender mercy.' Endured and blessed. God's end for the patient is mercy.
Above all, swear not; 'let your yea be yea; and your nay, nay,' lest you fall into condemnation. Plain speech. Let your word stand without oaths.
Is any afflicted? Let him pray. Is any sick? Call the elders; 'the prayer of faith shall save the sick,' and sins be forgiven. Praying faith. Believing prayer brings healing and pardon.
Is any afflicted? Let him pray. Is any sick? Call the elders; 'the prayer of faith shall save the sick,' and sins be forgiven. Praying faith. Believing prayer brings healing and pardon.
Is any afflicted? Let him pray. Is any sick? Call the elders; 'the prayer of faith shall save the sick,' and sins be forgiven. Praying faith. Believing prayer brings healing and pardon.
'Confess your faults one to another'; 'the effectual fervent prayer of a righteous man availeth much.' Elijah prayed, and heaven gave rain. Mighty prayer. Earnest prayer moves God's hand.
'Confess your faults one to another'; 'the effectual fervent prayer of a righteous man availeth much.' Elijah prayed, and heaven gave rain. Mighty prayer. Earnest prayer moves God's hand.
'Confess your faults one to another'; 'the effectual fervent prayer of a righteous man availeth much.' Elijah prayed, and heaven gave rain. Mighty prayer. Earnest prayer moves God's hand.
He that converts a sinner from his error 'shall save a soul from death.' Restore him. To turn a wanderer back is a saving work.
